libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No environment variables or system properties are required. For core-only coverage, use MapPropertySource, PropsPropertySource, or .properties/.props resources. Avoid YAML/JSON/TOML/HOCON examples unless deliberately adding the matching optional Hoplite parser module.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8367 [Automation] native-image run fails for com.sksamuel.hoplite:hoplite-core:3.0.0.RC1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Hoplite documentation often demonstrates YAML/JSON resource loading, but those formats require optional modules such as hoplite-yaml or hoplite-json; using them without adding the module will produce parser-related failures.
The native-image failure is more likely related to reachability metadata for Hoplite/Kotlin reflection/service-loaded decoders or parsers than to missing external setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: hoplite-core 3.0.0.RC1 resolves with only Kotlin reflection/stdlib and coroutines dependencies, includes its own built-in Java properties parser and core property sources, and can be meaningfully exercised without external services, Docker, environment variables, system properties, or optional Hoplite format modules.
